content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Buttons". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/268/B
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n, followed by n integers representing the buttons.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of presses required to turn on all the buttons.

solution.approach: Count the number of presses required for each button and return the minimum.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
count = 0
for _ in range(n):
    x = int(input())
    count += x
print(count)
